title: Automation due dates
excerpt: Due date set in automation but automation report task is still past due. What could be the problem?

posts.author: jamesbrown (JB07076)
posts.cookedHtml: Due date set in automation but automation report task is still past due. What could be the problem?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jamesbrown ~ Welcome to the Community!

There’s a myriad of different due date automations we have and we want to make sure that what you’re experiencing is expected behavior, so I think this question would actually be better to ask our Support Team at support@monday.com!

Please include any relevant screenshots of the recipe you are using and your board so we can take a closer look at what you need your automation to do and our team can assist form there - https://www.take-a-screenshot.org/

In the meantime, feel free to check out these Knowledge Base Guides we have created to help learn more about our automations:

  • monday.com Automations
  • Build your own custom automation

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
